title: Step S-SWQT-0016: MCP 渐进披露核心契约与纵向曳光闭环

items.statement: 建立小型稳定首跳与按需读取的新 swui MCP 契约，完成 initialize → 文档首跳 → Button 搜索 → 精确组件资源 → 包版本/错误的本地纵向闭环。

inScope: 重设 initialize instructions 与稳定文档首跳，完整暴露 @swqt/ui 和 @swqt/ui-tokens 的 AGENTS、llms、采用指南及必要设计/token 文档。
将组件发现从 resources/list 全量枚举改为 swui://components/{name} ResourceTemplate，并保留精确组件读取。
为 catalog.search、component.get、package.get、package.installHint 建立有界输入、title/description、只读 annotations、outputSchema、structuredContent 与 JSON text。
catalog.search 拒绝空查询，默认 limit=10、最大 25，返回 total/count/truncated 并满足 16 KiB 预算。
package.get 实施精确 version 解析、结构化 not-found、resolvedVersion 与 registry freshness/source 语义。
为 FormField、DateHelpers、cn/utility/type 等导出建立 catalog/import hint 正反向一致性检查，并补齐 TypeScript 类型。
扩展 unit、protocol contract 与 MCP smoke，覆盖成功、错误、边界和序列化预算。
outOfScope: Host MCP 配置、HTTP prefix 路由和项目 companion 收敛（S-SWQT-0017）。
生产 Caddy/DNS/upstream 变更、npm publish 与生产 deploy。
旧 URI、旧工具名、旧返回形状或全量 resources/list 的兼容层。

items.researchEvidence: Feature background/problem/context/acceptance；本地 MCP 审计：80 resources、0 templates、空搜索 77 项、工具缺少结构化契约、version 静默回落。
items.optionsTelos: Q-02=A：完整的新契约渐进披露重设；changePosture=break-accepted（user-confirmed）。

externalDependencies: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk 1.29.0 与 zod 的当前项目安装面。
Portal .generated 内容由 examples/portal/scripts/sync-docs.mjs 从 packages/* SSOT 生成。
userDecisions: Q-01=C：break-accepted，不保留已发布 MCP/Agent 表面兼容。
Q-02=A：一次完成完整渐进披露重设。
Q-05=auto：完成设计后自动推进本地可执行链。
items.axisPositioning: required；axisTrigger=public-contract+runtime-integration；axisCoordinate=stage:design, application:sdk/public-mcp, technology:TypeScript+MCP, validation:unit+contract+integration, layer:project, evidence:runtime-observed；坐标只定位证据类型，不替代测试。
items.axisSplitSnapshot: axisSplitSignals=risk-domain-split,validation-boundary,documentation-boundary；axisSnapshot=public MCP contract + protocol validation；当前保持单 Step，因为 resources/templates/tools/version 共用同一 McpServer 注册与一个原子协议预算；若 SDK 强制拆出独立 adapter 才再拆。
items.postDesignClarification: not-applicable；用户新增指令仅确认 Q-05=auto，未改变已确认范围、风险、验收或契约。
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: not-applicable；不创建 Agent 自选临时交接文件，嵌套 workflow payload 使用 sw payload prepare 的 tool-owned handle。

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: Unit + MCP protocol contract + in-memory integration smoke：文档首跳、ResourceTemplate 精确读、搜索边界/预算、工具 schema/annotations/structuredContent、package 精确版本/not-found/freshness、catalog import parity。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: AC1→initialize instructions 断言；AC2→resources/templates 数量与字节预算；AC3→每个宣称 URI 可读；AC4→空查询/limit/truncated/16KiB；AC5→tools/list schema+annotations 与 callTool structuredContent；AC6→精确版本成功/不存在负例；AC7→catalog↔exports 正反向；AC14 tracer→initialize→docs→Button search→template read→version/error smoke。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: public MCP/protocol contract→contract+integration；parser/search/version branches→unit；compatibility/security boundary→显式负例；主链→in-memory full-path smoke。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: designed：覆盖既有空搜索无界、80 resources、0 templates、version 静默 latest、缺失 structuredContent/import hint 漂移。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: project-defined（bun test --coverage 可用性由 implement 验证）
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 本地 in-memory 协议无法证明生产 gateway identity；转交 S-SWQT-0018 outside-in gate。
testDrivenDesign.followUp: S-SWQT-0018 在已部署入口执行远端 identity 与真实 Agent SpotCheck。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 公开契约更改须同步 packages/ui/docs/ADOPTION.md、Portal Agent 页面/部署说明与 project companion；实际回写由 S-SWQT-0017 承接。
items.problemDefinition: 当前 swui MCP 的首跳过大且不完整：组件被全量枚举，工具契约不可机读，搜索无界，package version 查询不精确，导致 Agent 过读、误路由和假成功。
items.requirementsDefinition: 建立一个唯一的新版本公共 MCP 契约：小首跳、按需模板、有界工具、精确版本与可机读结果，并以预算、负例和纵向 smoke 证明。
nonGoals: 不修改 SWS 中心服务或插件方法论。
不执行 npm publish 或生产 deploy。

plainLanguage.unclear: Agent 连接后既看不全必要文档，又一次看到全部组件；调用工具时还无法可靠判断只读性、结果形状和版本是否真实命中。
plainLanguage.why: 把第一跳缩小并把细节改成按需读取，才能同时保证准确触达与低上下文成本。
plainLanguage.outcome: Agent 能用固定流程找到 Button 和指定包版本；错误输入得到结构化错误，不再静默回落或淹没上下文。
plainLanguage.prose: 先给地图，再按名字取详情；每次调用都有限、有类型、可验证。

options.name: 使用 SDK 原生 ResourceTemplate 与 registerTool 契约
options.cuttingPoint: 在现有 McpServer 上集中定义稳定文档、动态组件模板和共享结构化 payload。
options.impact: 复用 SDK 生命周期，协议面与 tests/listTools/listResourceTemplates 对齐。
options.risk: 需要准确适配 SDK 1.29.0 的 outputSchema/structuredContent 类型。
options.rejectWhen: SDK 无法表达所需动态模板或结构化结果。

options.name: 自建低层 MCP JSON-RPC 分发
options.cuttingPoint: 绕过 McpServer 注册 API，手工实现 resources/tools 请求。
options.impact: 完全控制协议，但重复 SDK 能力并扩大错误面。
options.risk: 协议漂移、类型和 transport 兼容成本高。
options.validationCost: 高：需覆盖全部 JSON-RPC 分支。
options.rejectWhen: SDK 原生能力可满足契约。

recommendedOption.rationale: 现有 SDK 已支持 ResourceTemplate、tool annotations/outputSchema 和 structuredContent；可最小化自定义协议面并保留类型检查。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: break-accepted；公开只读发现面；packages/* 文档为 SSOT；生产部署不在自动授权范围。

granularity.whySmallEnough: 只闭合一个公共 MCP server contract 与其本地协议证据，不包含 Host/部署治理。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: resources/templates/tools/version/search 共用 handlers/catalog/registry-client 和同一协议预算；横向拆分会造成共享文件冲突与中间不一致契约。
granularity.splitSignals: 若出现独立安全/写工具、独立 registry provider 或 SDK adapter 边界则拆新 Step。
granularity.coarseJustification: 单一公共契约不变量与同一纵向 smoke 使当前粒度保持内聚。

readiness.reason: 范围、契约、错误语义、预算、测试映射和项目文件均已明确；不存在阻塞性开放决策。

forwardImpact.resolution: 将新 MCP URI/工具/门禁同步到 Host、docs、companion 与 tarball gate。
本地契约通过后再执行远端 identity 与 Agent SpotCheck；部署权限由外部 owner 提供。

items.profileNote: stepProfile=full；guardrail risk domain=public-protocol+agent-surface；changePosture=break-accepted inherited；ssotImpactExpected=ssot-update-required（S-SWQT-0017 更新项目事实入口）。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: examples/portal/server/{handlers,catalog,registry-client}.ts, examples/portal/scripts/{sync-docs,mcp-smoke}.mjs, generated token documentation, and focused Portal contract tests.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Small static first-hop; one exact component ResourceTemplate; bounded non-empty search; four fully described read-only tools with output schemas and dual structured/text output; exact package version semantics; import-hint parity; passing unit/protocol/smoke/type gates.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Portal server typecheck, Bun unit/protocol suite, in-memory MCP smoke, catalog/export parity, and explicit count/byte assertions.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: No data migration or external state mutation. Roll back the resource map/template and tool payload registrations together, then regenerate .generated docs. Old public MCP shapes are intentionally not retained under the user-confirmed break-accepted posture.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Replaced per-component static resource enumeration with 10 documentation resources plus swui://components/{name}; added typed catalog/import guidance; bounded search; exact registry version resolution with source/freshness; and complete MCP tool metadata, structuredContent, JSON text, errors, and budgets.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: The implementation closes every S-SWQT-0016 in-scope contract and exercises the actual MCP client/server protocol, including resource/template/tool discovery and invalid-input behavior.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: No npm publish, production deployment, DNS/Caddy mutation, or SWS service behavior. Host configuration and project-companion truth remain assigned to S-SWQT-0017; the strict path helper is staged for that next Step and is not claimed as this Step's acceptance evidence.

changeSurface.configAnchors: N/A — host and deployment configuration deferred to S-SWQT-0017.
changeSurface.documentationAnchors: packages/ui/{AGENTS.md,llms.txt,docs/*} and packages/ui-tokens/{AGENTS.md,llms.txt,docs/*} remain SSOT; synchronized copies live under examples/portal/.generated.
changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: Registry fixture metadata under examples/portal/fixtures/registry; no persistent data migration.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Use 10 stable package-document resources, a non-enumerating ResourceTemplate, server-side byte-aware truncation, a 1.0.0 MCP implementation identity, explicit FormField/DateHelpers/cn/Theme import mappings, and normalized error objects.
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: No acceptance deviation. The canonical path helper was tightened early because its focused assertion shares the protocol contract test file; its lifecycle evidence remains with S-SWQT-0017.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: The workspace Bun binary is not on the shell PATH, so direct absolute-Bun commands are required in this environment. Remote registry truth and deployed production behavior remain outside this local Step.

validationReferences.notes: Client and server TypeScript checks exited 0.
19 tests passed, 0 failed, 114 expectations; includes MCP list/read/call contract and count/byte limits.
In-memory MCP smoke passed for resources, template, four tool descriptors, structured outputs, exact version, search, and component read.
77 catalog exports checked against 281 package exports and 77 demos; alias and virtual-export policy honored.

gateOutcomes.evidence: sw validation run --scope change-posture --validation-surface auto-segment-review --scope-anchor S-SWQT-0016: pass, 0 findings.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: none for the user-confirmed break-accepted local contract.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Verified Feature posture predates no enforcement exception and has explicit user confirmation.
Server callback, Zod input/output schema, ResourceTemplate variables, and structuredContent types compile together.

gateOutcomes.evidence: 20 tests, 0 failures, 144 expectations; initialize identity/instructions, all 10 static reads, template read, listTools metadata, success/error tool calls, exact versions, source isolation, and budgets covered.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: HTTP middleware branches remain partly integration-covered and are exercised again in S-SWQT-0017/browser gates.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Review found and fixed full-response byte accounting and cross-registry cache contamination before rerun.

gateOutcomes.evidence: bun test --coverage: overall 85.71% functions / 88.91% lines; catalog 100% functions / 99.11% lines; registry-client 92.86% / 94.83%.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Raw Node HTTP adapter error branches are lower coverage and belong to the next host/integration Step.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Coverage gaps inspected; no uncovered core search/version/resource registration acceptance branch blocks this Step.

gateOutcomes.evidence: mcp-smoke passed initialize → all docs → template → tools → exact package version → Button search → component read.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: In-memory transport does not prove the deployed gateway identity; hard-deferred to S-SWQT-0018.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Smoke verifies full serialized search result remains within 16 KiB and structuredContent is present.

gateOutcomes.evidence: check:catalog-export passed for 77 catalog exports / 281 package exports / 77 demos; scoped git diff --check passed.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Future catalog changes can drift unless this existing gate remains required in CI.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Explicit alias/virtual/utility/type cases FormField, DateHelpers, cn, and Theme are protocol-tested.

gateOutcomes.evidence: sw workflow validate --id S-SWQT-0016: 0 errors, 0 warnings.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: Implementation record and lifecycle state are schema-valid.

items.projectCompanionFactDecision: ssot-update-required and intentionally open: S-SWQT-0017 owns Host configuration, documentation truth, validation handoff, and tarball freshness. This does not block S-SWQT-0016 because those surfaces are explicitly out of scope and separately materialized.

reviewDecision.reason: All S-SWQT-0016 hard gates pass after two review findings were corrected and revalidated; no blocking counter-evidence remains in the local public MCP contract.
reviewDecision.reviewProfile: full public-contract review with unit, protocol, integration tracer, coverage, negative cases, serialization budgets, and change-posture validation

promotionDisposition.promotionRevisitTrigger: Reopen if the SDK registration/output schema changes, resource list exceeds 12 items/12 KiB, full search response exceeds 16 KiB, catalog parity fails, or exact version lookup regresses.
promotionDisposition.closureIntegrityCheck: Implementation record done; review evidence complete; external production and Host facts are explicitly owned by S-SWQT-0017/S-SWQT-0018 rather than silently claimed.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0016-mcp-渐进披露核心契约与纵向曳光闭环.json
items.validationSummary: typecheck; 20 tests/144 expectations; coverage; MCP tracer; catalog/export parity; change-posture and workflow validation passed
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: typecheck; 20 tests/144 expectations; coverage; MCP tracer; catalog/export parity; change-posture and workflow validation passed

items.completionAuditProfile: full — public MCP protocol and Agent discovery surface
items.minimumSetSatisfied: Yes: implementation record, full review report, hard gates, counter-evidence fixes, requirement-by-requirement evidence, and downstream ownership are recorded.
items.upgradeToFullAuditReason: Required by stepProfile=full and the public-contract/Agent-surface risk domain.

requirementAudit.requirement: Initialize instructions and complete UI/token documentation first hop
requirementAudit.evidence: MCP_INSTRUCTIONS names the ordered first-hop flow; protocol test checks initialize instructions and reads all 10 static resources.
requirementAudit.risk: Future documentation additions require an intentional resource-map decision.
requirementAudit.followUp: S-SWQT-0017 synchronizes public docs and companion truth.

requirementAudit.requirement: Small resources/list and exact swui://components/{name} ResourceTemplate
requirementAudit.evidence: resources/list contains 10 entries under 12 KiB; templates/list exposes one component template; Button exact read passes.
requirementAudit.followUp: Keep count/byte/template assertions in the Portal suite.

requirementAudit.requirement: All four tools expose arguments, title, annotations, outputSchema, structuredContent, and JSON text
requirementAudit.evidence: listTools contract asserts every descriptor; all four success calls and package error call assert JSON text equals structuredContent.
requirementAudit.risk: SDK schema conversion changes could alter listed JSON Schema.

requirementAudit.requirement: Non-empty bounded search: default 10, max 25, total/count/truncated, complete response <=16 KiB
requirementAudit.evidence: Direct and protocol tests cover empty rejection, default, clamp, truncation, and complete dual-form result byte length.
requirementAudit.risk: Longer future catalog notes reduce returned count but remain truthful through truncated=true.
requirementAudit.followUp: Retain byte-aware truncation and budget regression.

requirementAudit.requirement: Exact package version, structured not-found, resolvedVersion, source/freshness
requirementAudit.evidence: 0.9.0 and 1.0.0 exact resolution, 9.9.9 VERSION_NOT_FOUND, fixture/cache/none source states, stale fallback, and registry-isolated cache pass.
requirementAudit.risk: Live registry availability remains an open-world dependency.
requirementAudit.followUp: S-SWQT-0018 verifies deployed live behavior outside-in.

requirementAudit.requirement: Catalog/import parity including FormField, DateHelpers, cn utility, and Theme type
requirementAudit.evidence: Typed importHint model plus explicit special-case tests; catalog/export gate passes 77/281/77.
requirementAudit.risk: New type-only or virtual catalog exports need an explicit import-hint case.
requirementAudit.followUp: Keep catalog/export gate required in CI.

requirementAudit.requirement: Unit, protocol, MCP smoke, typecheck, coverage, and negative cases
requirementAudit.evidence: Typecheck passed; 20 tests/144 expectations passed; overall 85.71% function and 88.91% line coverage; MCP smoke and catalog parity passed.
requirementAudit.risk: Production gateway and human Agent usability are deliberately not local evidence.
requirementAudit.followUp: S-SWQT-0017 handles host/browser/package gates; S-SWQT-0018 handles remote identity and human spotcheck.

items.workflowRunAudit: Five-stage chain followed: design artifacts and Q&A closure already recorded; implementing→implemented, reviewing→reviewed transitions used schema-backed workflow intents; auto advanced only after Tier-1 write evidence; promotion is next.
items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: No temporary handoff Markdown or shadow status files were created. Tool-owned payload handles were used for nested section writes. The Step remained schema-valid at review.
items.documentGovernanceAudit: Package docs remain SSOT and generated Portal copies are derived by sync-docs. No installed SWS asset or managed AGENTS.md block was edited. No npm publish or production deploy occurred.
items.frictionAndImprovementBacklog: Environment Bun is absent from PATH, requiring an absolute binary path. SWS workflow dry-run diffs are verbose for full-profile Steps; no methodology intake is required for task completion.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: All in-scope requirements have positive and negative evidence; review-discovered budget and cache-source defects were fixed and rerun.
closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditConsistency: The Step claims only local MCP contract completion and preserves explicit downstream ownership for Host docs and production identity.
closingSelfAudit.pluginSkillFriction: No blocking skill contradiction; tool-first writes and auto segment evidence were honored.
closingSelfAudit.terminologyCandidates: complete response budget (structuredContent + JSON text); registry-isolated cache provenance
closingSelfAudit.reusableWorkflowPattern: For MCP tools that must return both structured and text forms, budget the entire call result and contract-test list metadata plus calls through an in-memory transport.
closingSelfAudit.retrospectiveHandoff: Carry exact URI/tool/version facts into S-SWQT-0017, then test those facts against the deployed identity in S-SWQT-0018.

items.requiredFollowUp: Proceed immediately to S-SWQT-0017. Production deploy/publish remains unauthorized; S-SWQT-0018 must report a truthful external/HITL blocker if the new build is not deployed or a human spotcheck is unavailable.

validationSummary: typecheck; 20 tests/144 expectations; coverage; MCP tracer; catalog/export parity; change-posture and workflow validation passed
